name: Pesto with Bowties or Angel Hair Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound angel hair pasta or bowties
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy skillet, sauté the chopped peppers and onion with margarine until lightly browned.
2. Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
3. Stir in the marinated artichoke hearts and black olives, cooking until heated through.
4. Cook the angel hair pasta or bowties according to package instructions until al dente.
5. Stir the prepared pesto into the skillet mixture.
6. Toss the cooked pasta with the pesto mixture.
7. (Optional) For a meat dish, add cubed chicken breast and brown it with the peppers, onion, and garlic before adding the rest of the ingredients.
